resources.name: SDKMAN State API
resources.description: API test collection for SDKMAN State API - manages candidate and version state through JSON API

resources.name: 1. Health Check
resources.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring service status

resources.name: Health Check - Database Available
resources.description:
Returns SUCCESS when database connection is healthy.

Expected Response (200 OK):
```json
{"status":"SUCCESS","message":null}
```

resources.name: 2. Get Version List
resources.description: GET /versions/{candidate} - Retrieve lists of versions for a candidate with optional filtering by platform, visibility, and vendor

resources.name: Get All Versions for Candidate
resources.description:
Retrieves all versions for a candidate without any filtering.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of versions

resources.name: Get Visible Versions Only
resources.description:
Retrieves only visible versions for a candidate.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of visible versions only

resources.name: Get Hidden Versions Only
resources.description:
Retrieves only hidden versions for a candidate.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of hidden versions only

resources.name: Get All Versions (Visible and Hidden)
resources.description:
Retrieves all versions regardless of visibility status.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of all versions

resources.name: Get Universal Platform Versions
resources.description:
Retrieves versions for the universal platform.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of universal versions

resources.name: Get Linux ARM64 Versions
resources.description:
Retrieves versions for the Linux ARM64 platform.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of Linux ARM64 versions

resources.name: Get Linux x64 Versions
resources.description:
Retrieves versions for the Linux x64 platform.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of Linux x64 versions

resources.name: Get Universal Visible Versions
resources.description:
Retrieves visible versions for the universal platform.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array

resources.name: Get Universal Hidden Versions
resources.description:
Retrieves hidden versions for the universal platform.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array

resources.name: Get Versions with Tags
resources.description:
Retrieves versions including their tags array.

Expected: 200 OK with JSON array, each version includes a 'tags' field

resources.name: 3. Get Single Version
resources.description: GET /versions/{candidate}/{version} - Retrieve a specific version with optional platform and distribution filtering

resources.name: Get Universal Version
resources.description:
Retrieves a specific UNIVERSAL version.

Expected Response (200 OK):
```json
{"candidate":"kotlin","version":"2.1.0","platform":"UNIVERSAL","url":"...","visible":true,"distribution":null,"tags":[]}
```

resources.name: Get Platform-Specific Version
resources.description:
Retrieves a platform-specific version with distribution.

Expected: 200 OK with version details

resources.name: Get Version Without Distribution
resources.description:
Retrieves a version that has no distribution.

Expected: 200 OK with version details where distribution is null

resources.name: Get Version with Tags
resources.description:
Retrieves a version that has tags.

Expected Response (200 OK):
```json
{"candidate":"java","version":"27.0.2",...,"tags":["latest","27","27.0"]}
```

resources.name: Get Non-Existent Version - 404
resources.description:
Attempts to retrieve a version that does not exist.

Expected: 404 Not Found

resources.name: Get Platform-Specific Version Not Found - 404
resources.description:
Attempts to retrieve a version for a platform/distribution that does not exist.

Expected: 404 Not Found

resources.name: Get Version Empty Candidate - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to retrieve a version with an empty candidate.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: 4. Create Version
resources.description: POST /versions - Create new versions with various configurations. Requires Basic authentication.

resources.name: Create Version with Distribution
resources.description:
Creates a new platform-specific version with distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Version Without Distribution
resources.description:
Creates a new UNIVERSAL version without distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Version with -RC1 Suffix
resources.description:
Creates a version with release candidate suffix.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Hidden Version (visible=false)
resources.description:
Creates a version with visible set to false.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Version with All Checksums
resources.description:
Creates a version with md5sum, sha256sum, and sha512sum.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Version with Tags
resources.description:
Creates a version with tags array.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Version with Tags (No Distribution)
resources.description:
Creates a version with tags for a candidate without distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Create Version Invalid Distribution - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with invalid distribution value.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Create Version Multiple Invalid Fields - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with multiple invalid fields.

Expected: 400 Bad Request with accumulated errors

resources.name: Create Version Missing Required Fields - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with missing required fields.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Create Version Invalid Tag Characters - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with tags containing invalid characters.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Create Version Blank Tag - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with a blank tag.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Create Version Tag Too Long - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with a tag exceeding 50 characters.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Create Version Tag Starts with Dot - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version with a tag starting with a dot.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Create Version No Authentication - 401
resources.description:
Attempts to create a version without authentication.

Expected: 401 Unauthorized

resources.name: 5. Idempotent Version Updates
resources.description: POST /versions - Demonstrates idempotent behavior when posting the same version multiple times or updating existing versions

resources.name: 1. First POST - Create Version
resources.description:
Creates a new version. Execute this first.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: 2. Second POST - Idempotent (Same Data)
resources.description:
Posts identical version data. Should be idempotent.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: 3. Third POST - Update Existing Version
resources.description:
Updates existing version with new URL and visibility. POST overwrites existing.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: 4. Idempotent Without Distribution
resources.description:
Tests idempotency for UNIVERSAL candidate without distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: 6. Delete Version
resources.description: DELETE /versions - Remove versions from the system. Requires Basic authentication.

resources.name: Delete Version with Distribution
resources.description:
Deletes a platform-specific version with distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Delete Version Without Distribution
resources.description:
Deletes a version without distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Delete Version with -RC1 Suffix
resources.description:
Deletes a version with release candidate suffix.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Delete Version Empty Candidate - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete with empty candidate field.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Version Empty Version - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete with empty version field.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Non-Existent Version - 404
resources.description:
Attempts to delete a version that does not exist.

Expected: 404 Not Found

resources.name: Delete Version Invalid Distribution - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete with invalid distribution value.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Version Malformed JSON - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete with malformed JSON body.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Version No Authentication - 401
resources.description:
Attempts to delete without authentication.

Expected: 401 Unauthorized

resources.name: 7. Delete Tagged Versions
resources.description: DELETE /versions - Demonstrates conflict behavior when attempting to delete versions with active tags

resources.name: Delete Tagged Version - 409 Conflict
resources.description:
Attempts to delete a version that has active tags.

Expected: 409 Conflict
```json
{"error":"Conflict","message":"Cannot delete version with active tags...","tags":["latest","27"]}
```

resources.name: Delete Untagged Version - 204
resources.description:
Deletes a version that has no tags.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: 8. Delete Tags
resources.description: DELETE /versions/tags - Remove tags from versions. Requires Basic authentication.

resources.name: Delete Tag - Success
resources.description:
Deletes a tag from a version.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Delete Tag Without Distribution
resources.description:
Deletes a tag from a UNIVERSAL version without distribution.

Expected: 204 No Content

resources.name: Delete Non-Existent Tag - 404
resources.description:
Attempts to delete a tag that does not exist.

Expected: 404 Not Found
```json
{"error":"Not Found","message":"Tag 'nonexistent' not found"}
```

resources.name: Delete Tag Blank Candidate - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete tag with blank candidate.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Tag Blank Tag Name - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete with blank tag name.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Tag Invalid Distribution - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete tag with invalid distribution.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Tag Invalid Platform - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete tag with invalid platform.

Expected: 400 Bad Request

resources.name: Delete Tag Multiple Validation Errors - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete with multiple invalid fields.

Expected: 400 Bad Request with accumulated errors

resources.name: Delete Tag No Authentication - 401
resources.description:
Attempts to delete tag without authentication.

Expected: 401 Unauthorized

resources.name: Delete Tag Malformed JSON - 400
resources.description:
Attempts to delete tag with malformed JSON.

Expected: 400 Bad Request
